missing_doc_alert.subject: Document Request —  / FLOWMORE — Lead: P260600001
missing_doc_alert.body:
Dear Purchasing Team,

Thank you for your inquiry (Ref:  / FLOWMORE, Lead No: P260600001).

To proceed with the techno-commercial offer, we require the following document(s) which appear to be missing from the package:

  • P&ID Drawing
  • GA Drawing
  • Vendor List
  • Instrumentation Specification

Request you to kindly share the above at your earliest convenience so we may provide an accurate and timely quotation.

Regards,
Engineering Team
Cenlub Systems
